---
title: Why I Started Blogging
author: RandomPeerC
date: 2024-02-25
description: A personal reflection on writing in the age of algorithms
tags: ["#blogging", "#personal"]
---
A personal reflection on writing in the age of algorithms. I started blogging because I wanted to think more clearly.

Writing forces you to organize your thoughts. Publishing forces you to be honest about what you actually know versus what you assume.
